Event Catering
We bake seasonally at the shop as much as possible. All orders are for pick up at our Grant Park location at 437 Memorial Drive.
Please fill out a
catering request
if you'd like to place an order.

We offer vanilla or chocolate cakes in four different sizes. Each cake comes with your option of icing and filling.

here

If you are interested in renting either of our cafes,

event request form
